name: memeguard-ai
description: AI trust briefs for memecoin launches on BNB Chain.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @memeguard/api & npm run dev --workspace @memeguard/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @memeguard/shared && npm run build --workspace @memeguard/api && npm run build --workspace @memeguard/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @memeguard/shared && npm run lint --workspace @memeguard/api && npm run lint --workspace @memeguard/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @memeguard/shared && npm run test --workspace @memeguard/shared && npm run test --workspace @memeguard/api
